skill_summary.name: simple-dev
skill_summary.title: Simple Dev
skill_summary.description: Apply simple development constraints when the user explicitly asks for minimal or straightforward work, fewer abstractions, files, or jumps, flatter control flow, lightweight test-first changes, or N+1 avoidance. Use across planning, implementation, refactoring, and code review. Follow existing project conventions; do not replace dedicated TDD, architecture design, performance diagnosis, security review, or migration workflows.
skill_summary.core_value: 把一次性经验沉淀为可复用、可评估、可迁移的 Skill 包体。
skill_summary.audience: Skill 作者、复用团队和后续 reviewer。

completeness_score.label: 完整度
reasons: SKILL.md 已存在，是 Skill 的入口。
README.md 已存在，便于人工阅读。
agents/interface.yaml 已存在，便于跨平台适配。
manifest.json 已存在，生命周期信息可追踪。
reports/ 已存在，生成证据可以随包体迁移。

trigger_score.label: 触发清晰
reasons: frontmatter description 已存在，具备基础路由面。
description 有足够长度说明任务边界。
description 已包含使用场景或排除边界信号。
evals/ 已存在，可承载触发样例或质量检查。
intent-confidence 报告已生成，可辅助判断触发稳定性。

evidence_score.label: 证据充分
reasons: 已生成 17 / 20 类报告证据。
skill-ir.json 已存在。
compiled_targets.json 已存在。
intent-confidence.json 已存在。
证据不足：缺少 intent-dialogue.json, reference-synthesis.json, artifact-design-profile.json。

maintainability_score.label: 可维护性
reasons: SKILL.md 约 794 个词/字。
入口文件保持克制，可维护性较好。
references/ 证据不足，长指导可能堆在入口。
scripts/ 证据不足，重复执行逻辑可能仍靠人工。
evals/ 已承载可迁移检查。

portability_score.label: 可迁移性
reasons: agents/interface.yaml 已存在。
manifest.json 已存在。
目标平台或 adapter target 已声明。
入口文件未发现明显私有绝对路径。

context_cost.label: 上下文成本
reasons: 入口约 794 个词/字，references 约 0 个词/字。
分数越高代表上下文成本越低。
上下文成本处于可控区间。

capability_profile.trigger_strength: 手动触发 + description 路由

nodes.title: 意图澄清
nodes.body: Apply simple development constraints when the user explicitly asks for minimal or straightforward work, fewer abstractions, files, or jumps, flatter control flow, lightweight test-first changes, or N+1 avoidance. Use across planning, implementation, refactoring, and code review. Follow existing project conventions; do not replace dedicated TDD, architecture design, performance diagnosis, security review, or migration workflows.

nodes.title: 边界路由
nodes.body: 用 frontmatter description 决定是否触发，并写明相邻非目标。

nodes.title: 资产分层
nodes.body: 把入口、参考、脚本、评估和报告拆到各自目录，避免 SKILL.md 膨胀。

nodes.title: 证据回路
nodes.body: Ask only the highest-leverage clarification before adding package weight.

nodes.title: 漂移观察
nodes.body: Add near-neighbor exclusions and route evals before expanding workflow steps.

nodes.title: 杠杆升级
nodes.body: Ask one focused question and update intent context before adding assets.

trigger.description: Apply simple development constraints when the user explicitly asks for minimal or straightforward work, fewer abstractions, files, or jumps, flatter control flow, lightweight test-first changes, or N+1 avoidance. Use across planning, implementation, refactoring, and code review. Follow existing project conventions; do not replace dedicated TDD, architecture design, performance diagnosis, security review, or migration workflows.

inputs: a feature, bug fix, or refactoring request that explicitly asks for a minimal or straightforward solution
existing repository code, project conventions, public interfaces, acceptance criteria, and relevant tests
a plan or diff that needs review for over-abstraction, unnecessary scope, control-flow complexity, or N+1 risk
database workflows where batching must be weighed against transaction, locking, streaming, memory, or rate-limit semantics
outputs: A minimal plan, implementation, refactor, or review followed by a concise handoff containing actual scope, complexity tradeoff, before and after verification, database check, and unresolved risks.
结构化 Skill 目录，共 6 类关键资产。
should_trigger: 把重复流程沉淀为可复用的 agent skill。
团队复用前，需要明确触发边界、质量证据和维护责任。
用户说出类似需求时：Use $simple-dev for the smallest correct change: follow project patterns, verify before and after, and check N+1 risks.
should_not_trigger: 只需要一次性回答、没有复用价值的临时请求。
要求直接执行相邻任务，而不是沉淀或使用这个 Skill。
缺少必要事实且用户不允许澄清的场景。

boundary_cards.label: Owned
boundary_cards.body: Apply simple development constraints when the user explicitly asks for minimal or straightforward work, fewer abstractions, files, or jumps, flatter control flow, lightweight test-first changes, or N+1 avoidance. Use across planning, implementation, refactoring, and code review. Follow existing project conventions; do not replace dedicated TDD, architecture design, performance diagnosis, security review, or migration workflows.

boundary_cards.label: Adjacent
boundary_cards.body: 相邻任务需要先确认是否应转为独立 Skill。

boundary_cards.label: Excluded
boundary_cards.body: 不替代人工事实核查，也不静默扩大职责。

strengths: 触发面保持精简，并锚定在 frontmatter description。
已生成 Skill IR，核心语义可先于平台打包被审查和迁移。
已生成目标编译报告，可审查 IR 到 OpenAI、Claude、generic 等目标契约的映射。
已生成 Output Eval Lab scorecard，可比较 with-skill 与 baseline 输出质量。
已生成 Output Execution Runs，可区分记录样本、命令执行和模型执行证据。
已生成 Output Review Adjudication，可记录盲评决策、一致率和待评审项。
gaps: 当前关键证据较完整，优先保持轻量。
recommendations: 先改触发边界，再扩展工作流。
只把重复且稳定的步骤沉淀为脚本。
每次升级后重新生成报告并检查分数原因。

highlights: Primary prompt task family: Execution operation.
Complexity: medium — some judgment and multi-step structure are needed

Owned job: Apply simple development constraints when the user explicitly asks for minimal or straightforward work, fewer abstractions, files, or jumps, flatter control flow, lightweight test-first changes, or N+1 avoidance. Use across planning, implementation, refactoring, and code review. Follow existing project conventions; do not replace dedicated TDD, architecture design, performance diagnosis, security review, or migration workflows.
Leverage: Clarify the real job boundary — Ask one focused question and update intent context before adding assets.
Leverage: Tune the frontmatter description — Name the recurring job, expected input, output, and strongest non-goal in compact language.

risk_families.label: Code and command safety
risks: Commands can omit environment assumptions, working directory, or rollback notes.
Code snippets can look runnable while missing required inputs.
Error handling can be either absent or over-engineered.
constraints: Name the working directory, required inputs, and expected output for each command.
Mark destructive or external side-effect operations explicitly.
Prefer the smallest runnable snippet over broad framework code.
self_repair: Scan each command for cwd, input, output, and side-effect assumptions.
Remove speculative error handling that is not tied to a real failure mode.

human_judgment_boundary: Ask one focused clarification when the real job, output, or exclusion boundary is unclear.
Escalate visible tradeoffs when benchmark patterns conflict with local privacy, naming, or governance constraints.
Do not silently broaden the skill into adjacent jobs just because the examples are nearby.

world_class_readiness.conclusion_zh: 未生成 world-class ledger；当前报告不会宣称世界级完成。
world_class_readiness.conclusion_en: No world-class ledger was generated; this report does not claim world-class completion.

items.title: Tighten trigger and exclusions
items.why: The package needs clearer near-neighbor exclusions before it grows.
actions: Add 3 to 5 should-trigger and should-not-trigger examples.
Refine the frontmatter description to name the recurring job and non-goals.
Run a first trigger evaluation pass before expanding the package.
items.unlocks: Cleaner routing and fewer accidental activations.

items.title: Add the first execution asset
items.why: The package is still mostly prose. Add one asset that removes repeated manual work.
actions: Move stable procedural guidance into references if users will need it repeatedly.
Create one deterministic helper script if a repeated step can be executed instead of described.
Keep the main SKILL.md compact and route-oriented.
items.unlocks: Stronger execution quality without bloating the entrypoint.

items.title: Create an iteration evidence loop
items.why: The package should show what changed and why after the first draft.
actions: Generate the HTML skill report and keep it aligned with the package.
Record reference scan choices and non-goals.
Capture the next iteration choice explicitly before adding more files.
items.unlocks: A clearer path for the next author or reviewer.

introduction: 这份报告用于快速理解新生成 Skill 的定位、原理、触发边界和交付内容。
先确认重复任务、真实输入形态和可交付输出，再决定是否继续加 references、scripts 或 evals。
如果需求仍然模糊，优先回到 intent dialogue 收紧边界，再扩展包体结构。

targets.native_surface: OpenAI-style interface metadata plus neutral Agent Skills source
unsupported_features: client-native script permission prompts are represented as permission contract metadata

targets.native_surface: Claude-compatible neutral source folder with adapter notes
unsupported_features: vendor-native metadata fields are carried as adapter JSON and README notes

targets.native_surface: VS Code/Copilot Agent Skills project or user scope
unsupported_features: VS Code installation scope is documented but not installed by this compiler

residual_risks: Client-native permission enforcement is not provided by this target; installer or operator must honor metadata.
Client-native permission enforcement is not provided by this target; installer or operator must honor metadata.
